title: Dashboard charts not rendering in Safari
description: The live metrics dashboard charts render as blank boxes in Safari 17.x. Console shows WebGL context lost error. Works correctly in Chrome and Firefox.
raw_text: Dashboard charts not rendering in Safari. The live metrics dashboard charts render as blank boxes in Safari 17.x. Console shows WebGL context lost error. Works correctly in Chrome and Firefox.

title: Task sync duplicates when network reconnects
body_preview: Tasks are duplicated after network interruptions. The sync engine doesn't deduplicate on reconnect.
description: When the network drops and reconnects, the sync engine re-fetches all tasks from Jira/GitHub and creates duplicates in the local store. Need idempotency key or upsert logic.
raw_text: Tasks are duplicated after network interruptions. The sync engine does not deduplicate on reconnect. When the network drops and reconnects, the sync engine refetches all tasks from Jira/GitHub and creates duplicates. Need idempotency key or upsert logic.

title: LLM extraction returns empty for non-English text
description: Grok extraction agent returns empty task lists when processing emails written in Spanish or French. Non-English text is silently dropped.
raw_text: LLM extraction returns empty for non-English text. Grok extraction agent returns empty task lists when processing emails written in Spanish or French.

title: WebSocket connection drops after 5 minutes idle
description: The WebSocket connection to the dashboard times out after 5 minutes of inactivity. Need heartbeat/ping mechanism to keep alive.
raw_text: WebSocket connection drops after 5 minutes idle. Need heartbeat mechanism.

title: Priority P0 tasks not surfacing in daily plan top-3
description: Even when P0 tasks exist, the daily plan sometimes excludes them from top priorities. The ranking algorithm doesn't properly weight urgency.
raw_text: Priority P0 tasks not surfacing in daily plan top-3. The ranking algorithm doesn't properly weight urgency over other factors.

title: Memory leak in sync engine after 24h uptime
description: The sync engine's memory grows unbounded after ~24 hours of continuous operation. Heap snapshot shows uncollected connector history objects.
raw_text: Memory leak in sync engine after 24h uptime. The sync engine's memory grows unbounded after ~24 hours of continuous operation.

title: API returns 500 on concurrent inject requests
description: When two inject requests arrive simultaneously, the server returns 500 Internal Server Error. Likely a race condition in the StateStore.
raw_text: API returns 500 on concurrent inject requests. Race condition in StateStore.

title: LLM extraction token usage not tracked in traces
description: The Grok extraction calls don't record token usage in the traces table. Need to capture prompt_tokens and completion_tokens from the API response.
raw_text: LLM extraction token usage not tracked in traces table.
